sections.heading: What is a Random Number Generator?
sections.content: A Random Number Generator (RNG) is an online tool that creates unpredictable numbers within a selected range. It uses a mathematical algorithm to instantly generate random values that help in decision-making, math tasks, coding, simulations, gaming, and everyday choices. RNGs are fast, unbiased, and easy to use on any device.

subSections.heading: Enter the Minimum Value
subSections.content: Provide the lowest number of your desired range.

subSections.heading: Enter the Maximum Value
subSections.content: Provide the highest number of your desired range.

subSections.heading: Select Quantity (Optional)
subSections.content: Choose how many numbers you want to generate at once.

subSections.heading: Click Generate
subSections.content: The calculator produces random numbers instantly.

subSections.heading: Review Results
subSections.content: Double-check your range and use the generated numbers as needed.

subSections.heading: Instant Results
subSections.content: Numbers appear within milliseconds.

subSections.heading: Custom Range
subSections.content: Enter any minimum and maximum values.

subSections.heading: Multiple Outputs
subSections.content: Generate one or many numbers at once.

subSections.heading: Uniform Algorithm
subSections.content: Results are unbiased.

subSections.heading: Clean Interface
subSections.content: Beginner-friendly and easy to use.

subSections.heading: Free Online Tool
subSections.content: No registration or downloads needed.

subSections.heading: Math & Statistics
subSections.content: Probability, sampling, and classroom exercises.

subSections.heading: Games & Contests
subSections.content: Lucky draws, dice rolls, and random selections.

subSections.heading: Coding & Software Testing
subSections.content: Simulations, test data creation, and debugging.

subSections.heading: Education
subSections.content: Random roll calls, group assignments, and activities.

subSections.heading: Daily Decisions
subSections.content: Choosing tasks, meals, or activities.

subSections.heading: Research
subSections.content: Creating unbiased samples for studies.

subSections.heading: Example 1
subSections.content: Range: 1–100, Output: 57 (random)

subSections.heading: Example 2
subSections.content: Generate 5 numbers, Range: 10–50, Output: 12, 34, 49, 28, 20 (random)

subSections.heading: Example 3
subSections.content: Dice Simulation (1–6), Output: 4 (random)

faq.q: What is a Random Number Generator used for?
faq.a: It creates unpredictable numbers for math, coding, contests, and general tasks.
They are pseudo-random, suitable for everyday use.
Yes, many tools support quantity selection.
Yes, they follow a uniform distribution.

faq.q: Can I use RNG for school projects?
Is it safe for online contests?
faq.a: Yes, but for high-stakes events, use verifiable tools.
Yes, works perfectly on phones and tablets.
